untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) dynamic std dev threshold '[THRESHOLD_NEEDED]' not provided; (2) 'confirmation_candles_required' count '[THRESHOLD_NEEDED]' not specified; (3) 'mean_reversion_filter' logic not expressible with allowed operators; (4) subsequent price action monitoring and confirmation candle logic requires multi-bar sequential conditions beyond simple 3-field rule structure. Used Bollinger Bands as proxy for volatility-adaptive bands but cannot enforce exact threshold, confirmation sequence, or mean reversion filter.
translation_notes: Mapped 'outer bands' to bb_upper/bb_lower (using default 2 std dev). Entry requires touch followed by reversal back toward middle band (proxy for 'confirmation candle closes toward SMA'). Exit triggers on breach of opposite band or failure to mean-revert. Direction is bidirectional (LONG/SHORT variants provided). Regime filter applied to RANGING and MEAN_REVERTING as specified. Critical thresholds and confirmation logic remain untranslatable without explicit parameters.
